infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Sohoist needs your microphone to create your voice profile.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Sohoist uses your camera when you choose to take a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Sohoist uses your photos to generate a private pencil sketch portrait.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Sohoist uses your contacts to help you choose trusted referrers.
